news_list.title: FIIs Pull Out ₹1.13 Lakh Cr From Indian Markets in March Amid West Asia War
news_list.summary:
Experts point to a cocktail of factors driving the exodus. Dr. VK Vijayakumar, Chief Investment Strategist at Geojit Investments, said the selling was fuelled by "the weakness in global equity markets following the war in West Asia, the steady depreciation of the rupee, fears of decline in remittances from the Gulf region and concerns surrounding the impact of high crude price on India's growth and corporate earnings."

He added that FIIs were sellers across other emerging markets such as Taiwan and South Korea as well, pointing to a broader global risk-off trend. "The poor returns from India vis a vis other markets - both developed and emerging- during the last eighteen months is the principal reason for FPI's indifference towards India. If their sustained selling strategy is to change, there should be an end to the hostilities in West Asia and decline in crude prices," he added.

news_list.title: India-US Ties: Ambassador Gor Outlines 'Win-win' Economic Growth, Highlights Security Cooperation as Core Strategic Pillar
news_list.summary: The envoy added: "I want the positive outcomes of our partnership to be felt by ordinary citizens. American farmers selling more to Indian markets, joint research breakthroughs in energy and medicine, and both nations' militaries operating seamlessly together to ensure a safe and secure Indo-Pacific." Gor further noted that the US-India relationship is rooted in shared democratic values, mutual prosperity and common security interests that will shape the global order for generations.

news_list.title: India Expands Gallantry Benefits with Lifelong Complimentary Railway Travel for Sena, Navy, and Air Force Medal Recipients and Their Families - Travel And Tour World
news_list.summary:
New Delhi, India -- The Government of India has strengthened its commitment to honouring the nation's bravest by announcing lifelong complimentary railway travel to gallantry medal recipients and eligible family members. The scheme extends free travel on Indian Railways in First Class, 2nd AC and AC Chair Car classes to recipients of the Sena Medal (Gallantry), Nau Sena Medal (Gallantry) and Vayu Sena Medal (Gallantry). The policy further includes spouses, parents of posthumous awardees and one companion, reflecting an official welfare expansion by the Ministry of Defence and Ministry of Railways.

This new benefit aligns with published government sanction orders and underscores India's formal duty to recognise defence personnel whose acts of courage have stood above the call of duty. It follows existing eligibility for higher gallantry awards such as the Param Vir Chakra, Maha Vir Chakra, Vir Chakra, Ashok Chakra, Kirti Chakra and Shaurya Chakra, which already included free lifelong rail travel under previous government provisions.

The official government order, issued by the Ministry of Railways and supported by the Indian Ministry of Defence, states that recipients of India's gallantry awards who served with exceptional bravery will receive complimentary railway travel for life. This policy covers selected passenger classes -- First Class, AC 2‑tier and AC Chair Car -- on Indian Railways, and applies to the medal recipient and one companion per journey. It ensures that medal holders can access comfortable travel irrespective of personal means.

Importantly, the scheme extends to eligible family members. Spouses can use the travel benefit until remarriage. Parents of posthumous awardees can avail the benefit if the deceased served unmarried. The expansion demonstrates the government's aim to balance recognition with dignity and support for those who represent India's highest traditions of courage.

Under the official scheme:

The inclusion of these gallantry awards recognises the hierarchy of India's military and civilian bravery honours, placing these medals immediately after the top‑tier national awards.

Both the Ministry of Defence (MoD) and Ministry of Railways play central roles in implementing this policy. Defence authorities coordinate with Indian Railways to design eligibility lists, issue identity verification mechanisms and authorise travel passes. The implementation follows formal government sanction letters (GSLs) that identify eligible medal recipients and family categories.

Railway divisions across India will manage the travel entitlement through official pass systems, ensuring that authorised beneficiaries receive access when boarding trains in the specified travel classes. This coordination also involves modern verification procedures to align with Indian Railways' ticketing system and defence records.

In conjunction with the lifelong complimentary railway travel to gallantry medal recipients, the government has introduced complementary welfare measures designed to support ex‑servicemen, Agniveers and serving defence personnel transitions into civilian life. This includes a Framework of Cooperation between Indian Railways and the Indian Army, aimed at expanding post‑service employment opportunities, especially for Agniveers.

Under this framework, Indian Railways has reserved a percentage of jobs for ex‑servicemen and retired Agniveers across various job levels. Nationally competitive examinations and recruitment through Railway Recruitment Boards and Railway Recruitment Centres are part of this structured effort to create career continuity for defence veterans.

This expanded rail travel policy serves multiple outcomes. It tangibly benefits defence personnel and their families by removing travel cost barriers and acknowledging bravery in service to the nation. It also reinforces societal recognition of armed forces members as integral to India's national fabric. Free travel privileges symbolise gratitude and public respect.

The policy communicates to medal holders -- including those recognised for gallantry in peace and conflict zones -- that the nation values their sacrifice beyond ceremonial medals. Providing free access to Indian Railways' comfortable classes improves mobility for medical, familial, employment or ceremonial purposes throughout their lifetime.

Indian Railways will work with defence authorities to issue authenticated travel passes and design digital verification systems to support quick access at stations nationwide. Medal holders and eligible family members must present authorised documentation at the time of boarding, aligning with Indian Railways' operational protocols.

Authorities stipulate that the travel entitlement does not extend beyond specified travel classes, and eligible users must adhere to Indian Railways' passenger conduct and safety regulations for complimentary passes.

In conclusion, India's lifelong complimentary railway travel to gallantry medal recipients reinforces the Government of India's commitment to defending the dignity of its most courageous citizens. By extending free rail travel on Indian Railways to Sena, Nau Sena, and Vayu Sena Medal awardees and eligible family members, the government not only acknowledges exceptional bravery but also ensures ongoing mobility support for those who have served the nation with utmost valor. This policy represents a deep respect for sacrifice and strengthens welfare frameworks for military families across the country.

news_list.title: Low ground clearance: Hardik Pandya's Ferrari struggles over speed breaker on Mumbai roads - Watch | Off the field News - The Times of India
news_list.summary: Hardik Pandya was seen driving his new Ferrari, valued at around Rs 12 crore, on the streets of Mumbai, with a video of the outing circulating online ahead of Mumbai Indians' IPL 2026 opener against Kolkata Knight Riders on Sunday.In the clip, Pandya slows down near a speed breaker as the car's low ground clearance makes it difficult to pass over it. He then takes the bump at an angle to avoid contact with the road. After crossing, he briefly stops and interacts with police personnel, who greet him before he drives on.The video has drawn attention online, with the car and the road situation becoming a talking point.Mumbai Indians are set to open their IPL 2026 campaign against Kolkata Knight Riders. The team is looking to end a five-year gap since its last title, having last won the tournament in 2020 and securing five titles between 2013 and 2020.In the previous season, the Pandya-led side finished third after losing to Punjab Kings in Qualifier 2. The team will aim to go further this season with a squad that includes several members of India's T20 World Cup-winning group.Rohit Sharma is expected to play a key role with the bat, while Suryakumar Yadav, Pandya, Tilak Varma and Jasprit Bumrah form the core as Mumbai Indians begin their campaign.

themes.name: 地緣政治與全球避險情緒引發外資撤離亞洲市場
themes.insight: 因應西亞戰事、全球股市疲軟及貨幣貶值，外資在三月份顯著撤出以印度為首的亞洲新興市場，台灣與南韓亦出現類似的資金外流，反映出普遍的全球風險規避趨勢。
evidence: FIIs Pull Out ₹1.13 Lakh Cr From Indian Markets in March Amid West Asia War
the selling was fuelled by "the weakness in global equity markets following the war in West Asia, the steady depreciation of the rupee...
FIIs were sellers across other emerging markets such as Taiwan and South Korea as well, pointing to a broader global risk-off trend.
緊盯中東局勢，美元走勢掙扎

themes.name: 全球主要貨幣因通膨數據與地緣風險而承壓
themes.insight: 數個主要經濟體的貨幣正表現疲軟。日本因通膨放緩導致日圓走弱，英國CPI持平也使英鎊表現不佳，同時市場持續關注中東局勢，讓美元走勢陷入掙扎。
evidence: 緊盯中東局勢，美元走勢掙扎
日本通膨放緩，導致日圓疲弱
英國CPI持平，英鎊表現疲軟

themes.name: 新興市場前景分歧，投資人權衡風險與機會
themes.insight: 新興市場前景呈現多空交雜的景象。一方面，摩根士丹利等機構在新興市場債券中看到積極訊號；另一方面，亞洲股市（特別是印度）正因全球風險因素而面臨大規模資金外流。
evidence: 1.摩根士丹利新興債團隊：多項訊...
FIIs Pull Out ₹1.13 Lakh Cr From Indian Markets in March Amid West Asia War

themes.name: AI 投資主題持續，帶動企業軟體成長
themes.insight: 儘管市場存在宏觀經濟與地緣政治的不確定性，人工智慧（AI）仍被視為一個關鍵的成長驅動力，特別是在企業軟體領域，顯示AI作為長期投資主軸的地位依然穩固。

highlights: 🧭 東南亞 / 印度 24 則

ai_analysis.full_text:
【今日結論】
市場核心驅動因素已轉為地緣政治風險。伊朗戰爭引發的荷姆茲海峽航運中斷，正直接威脅全球能源（原油、LNG）與關鍵化學品（甲醇）的供應鏈，進而推高通膨預期。此發展可能迫使聯準會等主要央行延後或縮減降息計畫，對依賴低利率環境的高估值科技股構成重大利空。上週五全球股市的同步重挫、VIX恐慌指數的飆升，以及外資在台股的大舉賣超，皆反映了市場對此系統性風險的直接反應。
【新聞驅動】
本週末的市場焦點明確集中於伊朗衝突。荷姆茲海峽作為全球能源運輸的咽喉要道，任何中斷都會立即對商品價格產生連鎖反應。供應鏈瓶頸將直接轉化為通膨壓力，破壞了市場原先對通膨降溫、利率走低的樂觀預期。

在此動盪背景下，報告中提及的清大校務基金操作策略提供了重要的對照。其透過嚴謹的資產配置（股票、ETF、現金的平衡）與停損紀律，實現了長期穩健的回報。這與市場追逐短期熱點（如近期回檔的記憶體族群）形成鮮明對比，凸顯了在當前不確定性高的環境下，「守住資本」比「追求暴利」更為重要。
【國際與台股】
上週五市場避險情緒急速升溫。美股四大指數全面下挫，跌幅介於 1.6% 至 2.2% 之間，那斯達克指數領跌。VIX 指數單日大漲超過 13% 站上 31，而 CNN 恐懼與貪婪指數也跌至 10 的「極度恐懼」區間，顯示市場恐慌情緒瀰漫。

台股方面，外資在週五單日賣超高達 327 億元，投信與自營商亦同步賣超，呈現「三大法人齊賣」的格局，顯示法人圈對後市看法趨於保守。儘管台積電 ADR 逆勢微幅收紅，展現一定韌性，但在整體外資大幅撤離的背景下，單一股票的支撐力道有限，台幣走勢與外資後續動向將是觀察台股能否止穩的關鍵。
【KOL與情緒】
市場情緒指標呈現高度一致的悲觀。觀測的意見領袖中，看空比例高達 50%，遠超過看多的 17%，反映出主流意見對短期後市的憂慮。此數據與 CNN 及加密貨幣市場的「極度恐懼」指標相互呼應，確認了當前市場參與者普遍處於風險規避模式。
【操作含意】
當前市場操作的核心應是「風險控管」而非「尋找機會」。在全球性地緣政治風險未解除前，市場波動將持續劇烈。

1.  降低曝險，檢視持倉： 投資者應審視自身投資組合的風險承受能力，適度降低槓桿或高貝他值的部位，保留更多現金以應對不時之需。
2.  勿輕易搶反彈： 雖然市場在急殺後可能出現技術性反彈（先殺後漲），但在 VIX 高漲且基本面風險（戰爭、通膨）未解的情況下，搶反彈的風險極高。
3.  觀察關鍵指標： 下週應密切關注中東局勢的發展、原油價格走勢，以及外資在台股的賣超力道是否趨緩。這些將是判斷市場情緒是否回穩的領先指標。參考清大基金的策略，此刻的重點是保護本金，等待風險因素更為明朗後再行佈局。

selected_charts.title: 多來源新聞主題
selected_charts.description: Gemini 整合後的 3 到 5 個核心新聞主題與來源證據。
selected_charts.takeaway: 本週市場主軸已完全被地緣政治風險主導。伊朗衝突引發的供應鏈擔憂，正推升通膨預期並引發全球性的資金避險，外資自亞洲市場撤離，對風險資產構成沉重壓力。
selected_charts.action: 觀察衝突是否擴大，並關注其對能源價格與央行政策的連鎖反應。

selected_charts.title: 美股與風險資產
selected_charts.description: S&P 500、Nasdaq、SOX、VIX 與美元、黃金、原油的跨資產訊號。
selected_charts.takeaway: VIX 恐慌指數上週五飆升 13.16% 至 31 以上的警戒水位，伴隨美股主要指數全面重挫（那斯達克下跌 -2.15%），顯示市場對系統性風險的反應極為劇烈，避險情緒急速升溫。
selected_charts.action: 在 VIX 指數回到 20 以下前，應謹慎看待風險資產的反彈力道。

selected_charts.title: 美股產業輪動
selected_charts.description: 美股 S&P 500 產業 ETF 的輪動與避險偏好變化。
selected_charts.takeaway: 本週資金流向出現顯著的避險輪動。能源 (+1.69%)、公用事業 (+0.57%) 等防禦型類股逆勢收紅，而科技 (-1.95%) 與非必需消費 (-2.89%) 等成長型類股則遭大幅拋售，反映市場正重新定價風險。
selected_charts.action: 在避險情緒消退前，資金可能持續停泊在防禦性類股。

chart_commentary.takeaway: 本週市場主軸已完全被地緣政治風險主導。伊朗衝突引發的供應鏈擔憂，正推升通膨預期並引發全球性的資金避險，外資自亞洲市場撤離，對風險資產構成沉重壓力。
chart_commentary.action: 觀察衝突是否擴大，並關注其對能源價格與央行政策的連鎖反應。

chart_commentary.takeaway: VIX 恐慌指數上週五飆升 13.16% 至 31 以上的警戒水位，伴隨美股主要指數全面重挫（那斯達克下跌 -2.15%），顯示市場對系統性風險的反應極為劇烈，避險情緒急速升溫。
chart_commentary.action: 在 VIX 指數回到 20 以下前，應謹慎看待風險資產的反彈力道。

chart_commentary.takeaway: 本週資金流向出現顯著的避險輪動。能源 (+1.69%)、公用事業 (+0.57%) 等防禦型類股逆勢收紅，而科技 (-1.95%) 與非必需消費 (-2.89%) 等成長型類股則遭大幅拋售，反映市場正重新定價風險。
chart_commentary.action: 在避險情緒消退前，資金可能持續停泊在防禦性類股。

chart_orchestration.overall_summary: 【本週總結】 市場本週迎來劇變，核心驅動因素由通膨數據轉向地緣政治風險。伊朗衝突升溫引發全球對荷姆茲海峽能源供應鏈中斷的擔憂，直接推升原油價格並加劇通膨預期。此一發展破壞了市場原先對聯準會降息的樂觀期待，引發全球股市上週五的同步重挫。VIX 恐慌指數飆升、資金湧入能源與公用事業等防禦性板塊，並從科技股等高風險資產中撤離，清晰地勾勒出本週市場避險情緒急遽升溫的主線。

news_themes.label: 地緣政治風險引發全球避險與資金外流
news_themes.summary: 因應西亞戰事，全球股市上週五重挫，貨幣市場波動加劇，外資顯著撤出以印度為首的亞洲新興市場，台灣與南韓亦出現資金外流，反映出市場普遍的風險規避趨勢。
evidence: 因應西亞戰事、全球股市疲軟及貨幣貶值，外資在三月份顯著撤出以印度為首的亞洲新興市場，台灣與南韓亦出現類似的資金外流，反映出普遍的全球風險規避趨勢。
上週五全球股市的同步重挫、VIX恐慌指數的飆升，以及外資在台股的大舉賣超，皆反映了市場對此系統性風險的直接反應。

news_themes.label: 能源價格飆升加劇通膨與央行政策不確定性
news_themes.summary: 伊朗戰爭引發對荷姆茲海峽航運中斷的憂慮，直接威脅全球能源（原油、LNG）供應，推動布蘭特原油價格大漲。此發展可能迫使聯準會等主要央行延後或縮減降息計畫，對高估值科技股構成重大利空。
evidence: 伊朗戰爭引發的荷姆茲海峽航運中斷，正直接威脅全球能源（原油、LNG）與關鍵化學品（甲醇）的供應鏈，進而推高通膨預期。
此發展可能迫使聯準會等主要央行延後或縮減降息計畫，對依賴低利率環境的高估值科技股構成重大利空。

news_themes.label: AI 投資主題面臨宏觀逆風考驗
news_themes.summary: 儘管市場存在嚴峻的宏觀經濟與地緣政治不確定性，AI 仍被視為關鍵的長期成長驅動力。然而，上週科技股與費城半導體指數的普遍下跌顯示，在重大的系統性風險事件面前，即便是強勢的投資主軸也難以倖免。
evidence: 儘管市場存在宏觀經濟與地緣政治的不確定性，人工智慧（AI）仍被視為一個關鍵的成長驅動力，特別是在企業軟體領域，顯示AI作為長期投資主軸的地位依然穩固。
Nasdaq: change_pct: -2.15, 費半 (SOX): change_pct: -1.69, 科技: change_pct: -1.95

headline.teaser: 🚨 ANYA 風險警報：地緣政治
